# Hamilton Exteriors

> Bay Area design-build contractor specializing in roofing, siding, windows, ADUs, and custom homes. Licensed, bonded, and insured. 50-year warranty. Serving Alameda, Contra Costa, Marin, Napa, and Santa Clara counties.

## Company Info

- Name: Hamilton Exteriors
- Phone: (650) 977-3351
- Email: support@hamilton-exteriors.com
- Address: 21634 Redwood Rd Unit F, Castro Valley, CA 94546
- License: CA Contractor License #1082377
- Website: https://hamilton-exteriors.com

## Services

- Roofing: Full roof replacements, repairs, GAF-certified shingles, 50-year warranty, 3-5 day installs
- Siding: James Hardie fiber cement siding, dry rot repair, full replacements
- Windows: Energy-efficient replacements — double-hung, casement, bay, sliding, picture, garden
- ADUs: Detached ADUs, attached ADUs, garage conversions, junior ADUs
- Custom Homes: Ground-up construction, design & architecture, engineering & permits
- Home Additions: Room additions, second story additions, major renovations

## Service Areas

- Alameda County: Oakland, Berkeley, Fremont, Hayward, San Leandro
- Contra Costa County: Antioch, Walnut Creek, Concord, San Ramon, Richmond
- Marin County: Larkspur, Mill Valley, Novato, San Rafael
- Napa County: Napa, American Canyon, St. Helena, Calistoga, Yountville
- Santa Clara County: San Jose, Palo Alto, Mountain View, Sunnyvale, Cupertino, Santa Clara, Saratoga, Los Gatos, Campbell, Milpitas

## Key Differentiators

- Best Price Guarantee: We beat any written estimate on the same scope
- Factory Trained Installers: Licensed, bonded, insured, background-screened crews
- 50-Year Warranty: Shingle warranty plus 35-year labor warranty
- Personal Project Manager: One point of contact from start to finish
- $0 Down Financing: Available with approved credit
